steps.title: Notice the trend
steps.content: The passage says mathematicians traditionally may have worked alone, but evidence points to a shift in the opposite direction. The next sentence identifies that shift as collaboration with peers, illustrated by more multi-author publications.

steps.title: Choose the trend word
steps.content: A suggests similarity with the old pattern, which is wrong. B introduces a cause, but the sentence describes the shift itself. C adds another point rather than naming the trend. The blank needs a word showing that collaboration is becoming more common over time. The answer is D.
